title: Invariant Testing, Fuzzing, and Reproducible Benchmarks
description: Audit custom structures whose happy paths pass but long random operation sequences corrupt state. Learners cumulatively produce a model-based test and benchmark harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Write executable representation invariants that fail near the corrupting operation.
Compare custom operations against a simpler trusted reference model.
Generate reproducible operation sequences and retain seeds for failures.
